hypothesis: After the `lowrank_gated_residual` miss at `K=64, EF=16`, the next severe-stagnation move should remain architecture-only but switch to a different inductive bias that has shown high-K strength before: `routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` at `K=64, EF=16` may recover a non-dominated mid-K point because learned routing can allocate capacity more adaptively than the current bucketed backbone when the budget is still moderately large.
summary: Run an architecture-only comparison at `K=64, EF=16` by testing `routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` under the same pinned `signum` recipe. This follows the severe-stagnation rule to stop minor tweaks, targets a strategically valuable smaller-K slot, and probes a materially different conditional-allocation mechanism from both the current bucketed winner and the recently failed gated residual baseline.
self_review: This keeps the round attributable to one variable by changing only architecture while pinning `K`, `EXPANSION_FACTOR`, optimizer, LR, aux loss, and preprocessing. I chose `K=64` because the routed soft-codebook family historically performed much better at larger K than at `K=32`, making this a more informative test than another stressed low-K probe.
notes_to_memory: Round 172 continues severe-stagnation architecture search after `lowrank_gated_residual` at `K=64, EF=16` remained clearly behind the frontier.

`routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` is the next probe because routing is a distinct conditional-allocation mechanism and this family has shown stronger larger-K behavior than many other discarded alternatives.
next_hypotheses: If `routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` is competitive at `K=64, EF=16`, follow with `K=96` on the same family to map whether routing can challenge the current high-K bucketed anchor under the fixed EF=16 regime.
If it is still clearly worse, continue severe-stagnation architecture search with another materially different existing family rather than returning to more minor recipe changes.

If it lands in the same weak-but-smooth band as `lowrank_gated_residual`, reserve this family for a later optimizer probe with Adam plus an explicit LR retune instead of discarding the family-optimizer pairing outright.
